## Milestone 1: Widen session expiry
**Goal** — widen the inactivity window to 72 hours, add remember-me.
**Deliverables** — updated session TTL config, remember-me flag.
**Validation contract**
  - Scenario "Session expires after inactivity" passes
  - Scenario "Remember-me extends session lifetime" passes
**Steps**
- [x] Update session TTL config
- [x] Implement remember-me flag
- [x] Write scenario tests
